title: Offload detailed RCA item context to attachments and persist compact pointers in evaluation parameters

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing storage split: write detailed per-item RCA context as attachment artifact, keep compact item fields + attachment pointer(s) in evaluation.parameters, and validate with a 50-sample feedback run on 1039/45425.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Continuing implementation: wiring attachment-backed RCA persistence in FeedbackEvaluation so full misclassification payload is uploaded to S3 and evaluation.parameters stores only compact summaries plus attachment pointer. Next: add upload helper + tests + runtime validation on 50-sample feedback evaluation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation in progress: synchronous 50-sample feedback eval launched via CLI for scorecard 1039 / score 45425 with output redirected to /tmp/feedback_eval_45425.log. Awaiting completion to verify compact RCA pointer payload.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented and validated attachment-backed RCA persistence.

### Changes shipped
- Added `upload_evaluation_artifact_file(...)` in `plexus/utils/score_result_s3_utils.py` (S3 path: `evaluations/<evaluation_id>/root_cause.full.json`).
- Added canonical FeedbackEvaluation persistence path:
  - `_persist_root_cause_for_parameters(...)` uploads full RCA artifact (required; failures fail evaluation).
  - `_compact_root_cause_for_parameters(...)` stores compact RCA in `evaluation.parameters.root_cause` with:
    - `output_compacted=true`
    - `output_attachment=<s3_key>`
    - `output_compaction_version=feedback_rca_v1`
  - Compaction now trims heavy topic exemplar context and keeps only UI-required exemplar fields.
  - `misclassification_analysis.item_classifications_attachment` points to same artifact and `item_classifications_total` is persisted.
- Wired same persistence method into CLI feedback RCA completion path (`plexus/cli/evaluation/evaluations.py`) so DB writes are one-path and consistent.
- Added tests in `plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py` for:
  - successful attachment persistence + compact pointer contract
  - hard failure when attachment upload fails.

### Validation
- Test suite: `pytest -q plexus/Evaluation_feedback_test.py plexus/rca_analysis_test.py MCP/shared/analysis_test.py` => 46 passed.
- Runtime eval (50 samples): `b4292cb9-5bb7-4488-a003-f5a90b6eef01` completed.
  - `parameters.root_cause.output_compacted=true`
  - `parameters.root_cause.output_attachment=evaluations/b4292cb9-5bb7-4488-a003-f5a90b6eef01/root_cause.full.json`
  - compact parameters payload size ~107 KB.
  - full artifact download verified and contains complete RCA payload.

### Environment note
- Added `AMPLIFY_STORAGE_SCORERESULTATTACHMENTS_BUCKET_NAME` to root `.env` using bucket from `dashboard/amplify_outputs.json` to avoid stale default-bucket failures in local runs.
